title: Bridge Essay: Engineering Pareidolia: Mental Imagery, Perceptual Scaffolding, and Visual Creat

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Imagination as real perception — shared neural circuitry for imagery and perception, hallucination as continuum.

**Engineering Pareidolia: Mental Imagery, Perceptual Scaffolding, and Visual Creativity.**. Brain sciences.. PMID: 41892664. DOI: 10.3390/brainsci16030321. Pareidolia is often framed as aviewer-side illusion: atendency to perceive meaningful forms-especially faces-in ambiguous inputs.
